# ip2region C binding (vendored)

This directory vendors the minimal C binding files required by this project:

- `binding/c/xdb_api.h`
- `binding/c/xdb_searcher.c`
- `binding/c/xdb_util.c`

Source: https://github.com/lionsoul2014/ip2region (master branch)

The upstream project is licensed under Apache-2.0. Keep original headers in synced files when updating.
